ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot indicating the time of 2:30 using its arms.  The robot doesn't have hands, so the indication will be abstract. The movement will involve a combination of arm positions to suggest the two and the half-past. Frame 1 will show both arms extended slightly outward to represent the '2'. Frame 2 will have the left arm move slightly downward to begin to represent the 'half-past' and the right arm will remain in the same position. Frame 3 will have the left arm move further downward to more clearly represent the 'half-past'. Frame 4 will have the left arm move slightly back to a more neutral position, while the right arm moves slightly upward. Frame 5 will have both arms return to a neutral rest position.

frames.beat: left arm dips further, emphasizing the half-hour
left arm recovers, right arm lifts slightly
both arms return to rest, time is shown
